title: Topics of Medical Spanish III: Dentistry and Oral Health
description:
Este curso te introduce al vocabulario clave, gramática avanzada y habilidades comunicativas necesarias para diagnósticos dentales y tratamientos orales. Practica con situaciones reales y mejora tu capacidad de interacción en contextos médicos.

This course offers an introduction to essential vocabulary, advanced grammar, and communication skills for dental diagnoses and oral treatments. Engage in real-world scenarios to strengthen your ability to interact confidently in medical settings.
